indications.text:
PRIMAXIN I.V. is indicated for the treatment of serious infections caused by susceptible strains of the
designated microorganisms in the conditions listed below:
(1) Lower respiratory tract infections. Staphylococcus aureus (penicillinase-producing strains),
Acinetobacter species, Enterobacter speci...

PRIMAXIN I.M. is indicated for the treatment of serious infections (listed below) of mild to moderate severity
for which intramuscular therapy is appropriate. PRIMAXIN I.M. is not intended for the therapy of severe or
